mapper.select: select count(*) from users where status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE')
select count(*) from users where hire_date >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and hire_date < ADD_MONTHS(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)
select count(*) from users where resign_date >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and resign_date < ADD_MONTHS(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)
select count(*) from ai_unanswered_questions where status = 'PENDING'
select count(*) from supply_request where status = 'PENDING'
select d.dept_name as deptName, count(u.id) as employeeCount from departments d left join users u on d.dept_seq = u.dept_seq group by d.dept_name order by d.dept_name

select d.dept_name as deptName, round(sum(a.used_days)/nullif(sum(a.total_days),0) * 100, 1 ) as leave from annual_leave a inner join users u on a.users_id = u.id inner join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq
where d.dept_name like '%본부' and a.year = extract(year from sysdate)
group by d.dept_name order by d.dept_name

with months as ( select to_char(add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'mm'), -5 + level - 1), 'yy/mm') as year_month, to_char(add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'mm'), -5 + level - 1), 'mm') || '월' as month_name from dual connect by level <= 6 ), join_data as ( select to_char(hire_date, 'yy/mm') as year_month, count(*) as cnt from users where hire_date >= add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'mm'), -5) and hire_date <= sysdate group by to_char(hire_date, 'yy/mm') ), resign_data as ( select to_char(resign_date, 'yy/mm') as year_month, count(*) as cnt from users where resign_date >= add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'mm'), -5) and resign_date <= sysdate group by to_char(resign_date, 'yy/mm') ) select m.month_name as month, nvl(j.cnt, 0) as joinCount, nvl(r.cnt, 0) as resignCount from months m left join join_data j on m.year_month = j.year_month left join resign_data r on m.year_month = r.year_month order by m.year_month
